Senior Finance & Accounting Double Major Student

Executing high-volume financial workflows with an emphasis on analytical rigor, technical accounting, and decision-ready detail.

I'm Alex Jenkins, a Finance and Accounting double major at High Point University focused on investment analysis, corporate valuation, and technical due diligence. My work bridges the gap between technical accounting and advanced financial modeling so strategic opportunities can be evaluated, refined, and executed.

Focus Areas

Built for careful, decision-ready work.

Financial Analysis Presentation

Models, ratios, forecasts, and commentary that translate numbers into a story.

Accounting Due Diligence

Fundamental understanding of accounting principles with in-depth knowledge of financial presentation and personal tax.

Exam Preparation

CFA® Level I Candidate intending to pursue CPA licensure, with the goal of completing all four exams by the end of 2027.
